name: mental_health_heat_dome_stresses_northpine_auto_ben
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Mental Health, the situation tagged internally around mental health heat dome stresses northpine auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as autonomy against beneficence; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mei Chen
agents.identity: I am Mei Chen, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Mental Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Navarro
agents.identity: I am Hector Navarro, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Mental Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if autonomy advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for beneficence.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mei Chen must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mei Chen do?
